summary: Sprint 5 testing: 5 P1/P2 features - Material Reservation auto-trigger on WO release, APS Gantt holiday integration, Shift Handover sign-off, OEE Dashboard, PWA Service Worker. All 5 features working correctly.

minor.issue: Method is POST not PATCH — review request states PATCH but actual endpoint is POST /api/rahaza/work-orders/{wid}/status. Works correctly with POST.

ui_bugs.issue: React warning: <span> cannot be child of <option> in line filter select dropdown. Missing 'key' prop on list items. Functional but produces console errors.

issues: OEE nav is in MONITORING section not Quality & Analytics — which is correct per PortalShell config. Review request says 'analytics section' but it's actually in 'monitoring' section. This is acceptable.

test_results.wo_release_material_reservation: PASS - POST /api/rahaza/work-orders/{id}/status with status=released returns material_reservation: {reserved_count: 1, warnings: [], has_warnings: false}
test_results.wo_reservations_created: PASS - GET /api/rahaza/work-orders/{id}/reservations returns 1 item after release
test_results.aps_gantt_holidays: PASS - GET /api/rahaza/aps/gantt includes holidays array with May 1 (Hari Buruh) and May 14 (Kenaikan)
test_results.aps_gantt_holiday_highlight: PASS - May 1 and May 14 columns highlighted in red/pink in Gantt UI
test_results.shift_handover_sign_off_button: PASS - Sign Off button visible on active handover cards
test_results.shift_handover_sign_off_modal: PASS - Modal opens with notes textarea and Konfirmasi Sign Off button
test_results.oee_dashboard_loads: PASS - OEE Dashboard accessible at prod-oee route
test_results.oee_kpi_cards: PASS - OEE Rata-Rata, Availability, Performance, Quality Rate cards visible
test_results.oee_date_range_filter: PASS - Date range and line filter visible
test_results.oee_charts: PASS - Tren OEE per Hari and OEE per Lini charts render (empty state graceful)
test_results.sw_js: PASS - /sw.js returns 200 with valid PWA service worker JS
test_results.kalender_produksi_nav: PASS - Kalender Produksi visible in Produksi portal Master Data section
test_results.oee_dashboard_nav: PASS - Dashboard OEE visible in Produksi portal Monitoring section

action_items: Fix React warning in RahazaOEEModule: <span> inside <option> in line filter select — use string/text directly instead of JSX span
Fix missing key prop on list items in RahazaOEEModule
Documentation: WO status change endpoint is POST not PATCH
critical_code_review_comments: RahazaOEEModule uses <span> inside <option> which is invalid HTML and causes React hydration warnings. Fix: replace with plain string l.name || l.id
Missing 'key' props on list items in OEE module
seed_data_creation: Created 2 shift handover records via API for testing: one signed_off (2026-04-28), one active (2026-04-29)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 P1/P2 sprint features working: (1) WO release auto-creates material reservations via POST /api/rahaza/work-orders/{id}/status, (2) APS Gantt shows May 1 and May 14 holidays highlighted in red, (3) Shift handover sign-off flow complete with modal, (4) OEE Dashboard in Monitoring section with KPI cards and charts, (5) /sw.js and /manifest.json both return 200. Only minor issue: React warning for <span> inside <option> in OEE line filter.
rca_of_issues: RahazaOEEModule renders line options as: . HTML spec prohibits block/inline elements inside
